title: Po Po Yen Lyrics A H Kaashif
stanzas: <div>Po Po En ft Sid Sriram Lyrics A H Kaashif

Po po en
idhayam tharaiyil
vilundhu sidhari pogattum

Po po en
nizhalum pirindhu
ennai thanimai aakkattum

kovam un kovam
en nenjai kondru poga.
kangal en kangal
kanneeril nenaiyuthe

podhum podhum
eppodhum un ninaivugal
paavam en ullaam
sollaamal karaiyuthe

kaayathai kankondu
paarthid mudiyum
valiyai kandida kangal illai.

Po po en
idhayam tharaiyil
vilundhu sidhari pogattum

Po po en
nizhalum pirindhu
ennai thanimai aakkattum

yaeno ennai mattum
vazhkai kolluthadi
naanthaan enna seyya
ellaam kaivandhu
poguthadi.

nee en arugile
irundha podhu parandhavan
nee en tholaivile
pirindhapodhu sidhainthavan

yaedhum ennodu
illaamal pogattum
nee en kaikorthu
vazhnthaal podhume

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Po Po Yen'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional sentiments.

In which movie does 'Po Po Yen' feature?

The movie context is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of 'Po Po Yen'?

The song is sung by the talented Sid Sriram.

Who composed the music for 'Po Po Yen'?

The music is composed by A H Kaashif.

When was 'Po Po Yen' released?

The song was released on February 22, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Po Po Yen' is a heartfelt expression of love and solitude, encapsulating the emotional turmoil of separation. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. The song beautifully illustrates the struggle between love and loneliness, making it relatable for anyone who has faced heartbreak. Sid Sriram's captivating voice adds depth to the song, making it a perfect choice for moments of reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Po Po Yen is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Sid Sriram's soulful vocals and A H Kaashif's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this track and let it sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: Go away, my heart should fall and find peace.
Go away, my shadow should separate and make me lonely.
Your anger takes away my peace. My eyes are filled with tears.
Enough, always your memories are troubling my heart without saying anything.
With my eyes, I can see the path, but there is no way to find it.
With the wind, I can’t create a picture, there is nothing to be done.
Isn't it difficult to understand the words of love when spoken?
Go away, my heart should fall and find peace.
Go away, my shadow should separate and make me lonely.
Why is life only taking me away? What can I do, everything is slipping away.
When you were near me, you were a wanderer, when you left, you became a burden.
Enough, I am crying because of you, enough, I am crying with you.
Let anything go away, if you live with my hand, that is enough.
